examples: The yeomen were the major producers in the Wei Dynasty.
The family had possessed and cultivated an estate there for many years, as yeomen and farmers .
From the middle period, the basic society was destroyed and many yeomen were reduced to servants, because of land centralization and ineqality of taxes and labor services.
Many yeomen, particularly in business services, depend on industry for their livelihoods either directly or indirectly.
Kazan introduced into cinema the faces and the vibrancy of the unseen American mongrel gallery: Mexican peasants, Italian longshoremen, Appalachian yeomen, black sharecroppers, Anatolian immigrants.
